html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be used to block attacks. Successfully blocking an attack decreases the block cooldown.
It can only be equipped by Wigfrids who have the "Battle Rönd" skill.”

-

The Battle Rönd is a character-specific craftable Weapon and wearable hand slot Armor exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted and equipped by Wigfrid after unlocking the Battle Rönd Skill and requires 4 Gold Nuggets and 3 Beefalo Wool to craft.

It has a durability of 420 HP and absorbs 85% of all physical Damage. Despite it appearing as a shield, it is equipped like a usual weapon in the hand slot. Additionally, although it uses the default unarmed attack animation, it is "swung" as fast as a Spear. When used as a weapon, it loses 3 HP of durability each attack, dealing 63.8 damage to its target (its base damage is 51, Wigfrid has an innate +25% damage modifier), which is the same as Wigfrid using a Tentacle Spike.

The Rönd has a special ability to parry, which is performed with a right click by default. When right clicking, the prompt to block comes up while generating a cone-shaped directional guide, indicating where it must be aimed. Successfully blocking attacks from the direction it comes from will absorb 100% of incoming physical and Planar Damage, while losing no durability; facing the wrong direction will result in damage and durability loss as usual. The blocking lasts 1 second, or 2.5 seconds if the Battle Rönd Enhancement I Skill is unlocked.

This ability has a cooldown. Whenever the Rönd is equipped, its cooldown to be used the first time is 2 seconds.

After use, the ability has one of two cooldowns: after successfully parrying an attack, the cooldown is 3 seconds. If no attack was parried, either by being hit from the unprotected direction or the parry timer running out, the cooldown is 10 seconds. If the Battle Rönd Enhancement II Skill is unlocked, the next attack Wigfrid makes after parrying deals +15 to +30 physical damage, depending on the damage blocked. For maximum damage, the shield must have blocked 60 or more damage. This damage is affected by Wigfrid's +25% damage modifier.

Trivia

  • The Battle Rönd was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.
  • On beta release prior to update 585956, the Battle Rönd's cooldown on equip was 2.5 seconds, it lost 4 HP of durability for each attack as a weapon, and its cooldown after a successful parry was 4 seconds, and Battle Rönd Enhancement II made the shield deal simply 10 additional damage after a parry.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"wathgrithr_shield"
“Protect me!!”
–Wilson
“If I know Wigfrid, she'll still find a way to use it as a weapon.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang only carry shield for accessorize.”
–Wolfgang
“What do I have that's worth protecting?”
–Wendy
“SHIELDS ARE FOR SOFT FLESHY FLESHSACKS”
–WX-78
“I'm happy to see her exploring more defensive tactics.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll take a lickin', eh Luce?”
–Woodie
“How uncharacteristically pragmatic of her.”
–Maxwell
“I shall defend my allies with spear and shield!”
–Wigfrid
“Will it protect us from getting squashed?”
–Webber
“Mon dieu, it's heavier than it looks!”
–Warly
“Feel safe with hard shell”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' more practical than a good sturdy shield.”
–Winona
“Wield this shield on the battlefield.”
–Wortox
“Round wall for carry.”
–Wurt
“I feel safer already!”
–Walter
“Some added protection is more than welcome.”
–Wanda
“Can be used to block attacks. Successfully blocking an attack decreases the block cooldown.
It can only be equipped by Wigfrids who have the "Battle Rönd" skill.”
-

When used as a weapon, it loses 3 HP of durability each attack, dealing 63.8 damage to its target (its base damage is 51, Wigfrid has an innate +25% damage modifier), which is the same as Wigfrid using a Tentacle Spike.
The Rönd has a special ability to parry, which is performed with a right click by default. When right clicking, the prompt to block comes up while generating a cone-shaped directional guide, indicating where it must be aimed. Successfully blocking attacks from the direction it comes from will absorb 100% of incoming physical and Planar Damage, while losing no durability; facing the wrong direction will result in damage and durability loss as usual. The blocking lasts 1 second, or 2.5 seconds if the Battle Rönd Enhancement I Skill is unlocked.

After use, the ability has one of two cooldowns: after successfully parrying an attack, the cooldown is 3 seconds. If no attack was parried, either by being hit from the unprotected direction or the parry timer running out, the cooldown is 10 seconds.
If the Battle Rönd Enhancement II Skill is unlocked, the next attack Wigfrid makes after parrying deals +15 to +30 physical damage, depending on the damage blocked. For maximum damage, the shield must have blocked 60 or more damage. This damage is affected by Wigfrid's +25% damage modifier.

The Battle Rönd was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.
On beta release prior to update 585956, the Battle Rönd's cooldown on equip was 2.5 seconds, it lost 4 HP of durability for each attack as a weapon, and its cooldown after a successful parry was 4 seconds, and Battle Rönd Enhancement II made the shield deal simply 10 additional damage after a parry.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Battle Rönd là một Vũ khí có thể chế tạo dành riêng cho nhân vật và Áo giáp có thể đeo trên tay dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo và trang bị bởi Wigfrid sau khi mở khóa Kỹ năng Battle Rönd và cần 4 Thỏi Vàng và 3 Lông Bò Lai để chế tạo.

The '''Battle Rönd''' is a character-specific craftable [[Weapon]] and wearable hand slot Armor exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted and equipped by [[Wigfrid/Don't Starve Together|Wigfrid]] after unlocking the {{pic|24|Battle Rönd (Skill)}} [[Wigfrid/Don't_Starve_Together#Battle_Rönd|Battle Rönd]] Skill and requires 4 [[Gold Nugget]]s and 3 [[Beefalo Wool]] to craft.

It has a durability of 420 HP and absorbs 85% of all physical [[Damage]]. Despite it appearing as a shield, it is equipped like a usual weapon in the hand slot. Additionally, although it uses the default unarmed attack animation, it is "swung" as fast as a [[Spear]]. When used as a weapon, it loses 3 HP of durability each attack, dealing 63.8 damage to its target (its base damage is 51, Wigfrid has an innate +25% damage modifier), which is the same as Wigfrid using a [[Tentacle Spike]].

The Rönd has a special ability to parry, which is performed with a right click by default. When right clicking, the prompt to block comes up while generating a cone-shaped directional guide, indicating where it must be aimed. Successfully blocking attacks from the direction it comes from will absorb 100% of incoming physical and [[Damage#Planar Damage|Planar Damage]], while losing no durability; facing the wrong direction will result in damage and durability loss as usual. The blocking lasts 1 second, or 2.5 seconds if the {{pic|24|Battle Rönd Enhancement I}} [[Battle Rönd Enhancement|Battle Rönd Enhancement I]] Skill is unlocked.

This ability has a cooldown. Whenever the Rönd is equipped, its cooldown to be used the first time is 2 seconds.

After use, the ability has one of two cooldowns: after successfully parrying an attack, the cooldown is 3 seconds. If no attack was parried, either by being hit from the unprotected direction or the parry timer running out, the cooldown is 10 seconds. If the {{pic|24|Battle Rönd Enhancement II}} [[Battle Rönd Enhancement|Battle Rönd Enhancement II]] Skill is unlocked, the next attack Wigfrid makes after parrying deals +15 to +30 physical damage, depending on the damage blocked. For maximum damage, the shield must have blocked 60 or more damage. This damage is affected by Wigfrid's +25% damage modifier.
